data.body:
KICKOFF (rebar-implement /rebar-implement sonic-columned-sturgeon).
Epic 6d0d-7580-e18f-48c3 / sonic-columned-sturgeon: asymmetric env-attributed operation certificates.
Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-opcert branch epic/opcert-sonic from origin/main (ee49b4a89). venv active, commit-msg + pre-commit hooks installed.
Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim + require_completion_verification_for_close (both LLM; API key present).
Landing method: Gerrit stacked relation-chain (push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main); each commit needs rebar-ticket trailer + DCO Signed-off-by; commit as joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com / RebarBotNava with Joe Oakhart DCO name.
TREE (6 open children + 1 already-closed task 5893):
 368c garlicky-deviant-kakapo (story) opcert.v1 Ed25519 kind + subject binding + era rotation [FOUNDATION]
 42d1 urban-dihydric-trogon (story) out-of-band trusted-env key config + required-env policy + verify-against-pinned
 4214 unfair-mindless-halcyon (story) merge-gate CI — EXTEND shipped verify-identity.yaml, not parallel
 ee0b imminent-reformable-fruitbat (story) trusted rebar-mcp remote-exec authoritative-fetch + AWS IaC
 8f1d educatory-astrakhan-wallaroo (story) remove legacy HMAC scheme (contract) + expand-contract migration
 6a89 promethean-sentient-rockrat (task, non-code) docs + ADR (xref ADR 0046)
Stack/dep order: 368c -> 42d1 -> 4214 -> ee0b -> 8f1d -> 6a89.
Prereqs shipped: foundation 2fd4 (src/rebar/attest/ substrate) CLOSED; identity e68d (verify-identity.yaml gate, authorship.py era-validity) landed.
NEXT: deep-explore substrate (subagent running), then plan-review epic, claim, recurse under held-out TDD.
